title: Indiana rejects, cancels voter registration for more than half of flagged immigrant Hoosiers
description:
The state of Indiana has rejected or canceled the voter registrations of more than 60% of immigrant Hoosiers challenged under a recent proof of citizenship law — not including several hundred with pending cases.

description:

title: Southwest Indiana coalition invests $1 million to boost early childhood education
description:
The Early Childhood Education Business Roundtable is committing nearly $1 million over the next two years to expand the Building Blocks Regional Training Center model to more early learning sites in Evansville.

description:

title: Elevance files lawsuit against former executive for noncompete violation
description:
Indianapolis-based Elevance Health is suing a former executive and accusing him of violating a noncompete agreement when he began working this month for a rival health insurance company.

title: Indiana child well-being rank declines in national report
description:

title: Gary airport positioned to benefit from Bears stadium in Indiana, officials say
description:
Gary officials think the city’s airport would see a boost in traffic if neighboring Hammond lands a $2 billion Chicago Bears stadium being considered for a site near Wolf Lake.
